items.phrase: If I won the lottery, I would...
items.translation: Если бы я выиграл в лотерею, я бы...
items.example: If I won the lottery, I would travel around the world.

items.translation: Что бы ты сделал, если бы...?
items.example: What would you do if you became famous overnight?

items.phrase: If I were you, I would...
items.example: If I were you, I would take that acting class.

items.phrase: If I could change one thing, I would...
items.translation: Если бы я мог изменить одну вещь, я бы...
items.example: If I could change one thing, I would move to Los Angeles.

items.phrase: I would love to... if I had the chance
items.translation: Я бы очень хотел..., если бы был шанс
items.example: I would love to star in a film if I had the chance.
Would you ever give up your career for fame?
